settings.heading: Our lighting showroom in Doha
settings.subtitle: See it lit before you buy it. Our showroom has the range on display, and our team can identify a part from a photo or the old bulb in your hand.

settings.heading: Find us
settings.subtitle: Address, hours and directions to the showroom.
settings.hours: Sat to Thu, 9am to 9pm · Fri 4pm to 9pm
settings.map_placeholder: Add a Google Maps embed URL in the theme editor to show the showroom location here.
settings.collect_text: Order online and pick up in store — usually ready the same day.

settings.title: Colour temperature is easier to see than to read
settings.text: The difference between 2700K, 4000K and 6500K is obvious when it is lit in front of you and almost meaningless on a screen. If you are choosing lighting for a majlis or a whole villa, come and look.

settings.title: Bring the old part
settings.text: A dead bulb, a failed ballast or a photo of the fitting. Our team identifies parts every day, and it is faster in person than over any messaging app.

settings.title: Collect an online order
settings.text: Order on the site and choose collection at checkout. Wait for the confirmation that it is ready before you travel.

settings.title: Talk through a project
settings.text: If you are lighting a villa, a cafe or a site, bring the drawings. The specification conversation is the part that saves money later.

settings.name: Ahmed Al-Kuwari
settings.text: Great selection in store and the staff really know lighting. Left with exactly what I needed.

settings.name: Sara Abdullah
settings.text: Collected my order in store the same day. Quick, friendly and easy.

settings.name: Mohammed Al-Thani
settings.text: Seeing the lights on before buying made the decision simple. Highly recommend a visit.
